response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform design — core requirements for this role. Their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with only a brief, outdated C++ stint at National Instruments unrelated to modern high-performance or secure systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and build developer tooling and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++ experience for high-performance industrial systems
No demonstrable exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Lacks experience with MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or industrial IoT protocols
